action.reasoning: Current PPO per env (500k steps each, frame stacking, intrinsic bonus) yields only 0.4% success. Need stronger exploration and more environment interactions. Switching to flat observation (flattening stacked image + direction + mission tokens) and using MLP instead of CNN – faster training and may extract better features for small 7×7 grids. Increase intrinsic bonus scale to 1.0, entropy coefficient to 0.05, and total steps per env to 1M (10M total). This training should take ~1.5h, leaving time for a possible final improvement iteration. Submit eval immediately after training.
